title: Non-record: EchoHarp + random kitchen-sink adapter
author: miles-nash

data.description: Causal compressor prior that adjusts logits using copy, unigram/recency, and motif-continuation echoes with learned scalar gates.
Frozen deterministic random kitchen-sink feature adapter using random ReLU-squared features regenerated from a seed.
Official clean baseline backbone with tied embeddings implied by the baseline setup.

novel_contributions: EchoHarp causal compressor prior with copy, recency, and motif-continuation echoes
Deterministic frozen random kitchen-sink adapter regenerated from a seed so the random basis is not stored
Compact non-record 16MB submission exploring a neural-plus-procedural compression hybrid
Negative-result probe showing the mechanism is runnable but not yet better than the matched baseline
